description: Letter addressed to to Moshe, probably Moshe b. Yehuda, the head of the community of Alexandria in the last quarter of the 15th century. In Judaeo-Arabic and Hebrew. The letter contains an extended philosophical query into the question of life after death.
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
